content: Single-page marketing site. Root index.html is production. cra/ dir is legacy/redirect only. Do not add multipage architecture without explicit user request.
Brand colors via CSS custom properties: --cream, --navy, --gold. Serif headings (--serif), sans body (--sans). No transition-all. Layered subtle shadows.

name: PageTransition
description: PageTransition component (src/components/ui/PageTransition.tsx) wraps every page for fade-in on navigation. Import in page.tsx (server component) — RSC can render client components fine.

content: Animation variants live in src/lib/animations.ts: fadeInUp, fadeIn, fadeInLeft, fadeInRight, scaleIn, staggerContainer, staggerContainerFast, slideInLeft, slideInRight. ScrollReveal handles whileInView once:true + margin:-80px.
